summary: Backend testing of Cierre de Produccion module (consolidated cierre.py). All 18 tests passed covering: preview-cierre, cierre-produccion (GET/POST), reabrir-cierre, balance-pdf, pt-item assignment, and validation scenarios.
features_verified: GET /api/registros/{id}/preview-cierre - Returns desglose de costos with errores_validacion and puede_cerrar - PASS
GET /api/registros/{id}/preview-cierre - Returns 400 for already closed registro - PASS
GET /api/registros/{id}/preview-cierre - Returns 404 for non-existent registro - PASS
GET /api/registros/{id}/cierre-produccion - Returns cierre congelado with snapshot_json, estado_cierre, cerrado_por - PASS
GET /api/registros/{id}/cierre-produccion - Returns null for registro without cierre - PASS
POST /api/registros/{id}/cierre-produccion - Returns 400 for already closed registro - PASS
POST /api/registros/{id}/cierre-produccion - Validates PT assignment before cierre - PASS
POST /api/registros/{id}/reabrir-cierre - Returns 400 for empty motivo - PASS
POST /api/registros/{id}/reabrir-cierre - Returns 400 for motivo < 5 chars - PASS
POST /api/registros/{id}/reabrir-cierre - Returns 404 for registro without cierre - PASS
GET /api/registros/{id}/balance-pdf - Returns PDF status 200 for closed registro - PASS
GET /api/registros/{id}/balance-pdf - Returns PDF status 200 for registro without cierre - PASS
GET /api/registros/{id}/balance-pdf - Returns 404 for non-existent registro - PASS
PUT /api/registros/{id}/pt-item - Returns 400 for closed registro (CERRADA state) - PASS
PUT /api/registros/{id}/pt-item - Returns 404 for invalid item_id - PASS
PUT /api/registros/{id}/pt-item - Clears PT when null is passed - PASS
GET /api/registros returns paginated list correctly - PASS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data: Registro 009 (a097d502-7058-4d00-a840-0ce8a3bff131) CERRADO, Registro 006 (169c1b44-5b94-49cb-a6d2-42c3fdeb3a69) Lavanderia sin cierre
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cierre module fully tested. Key test data: Registro 009 (n_corte 009, ID a097d502-7058-4d00-a840-0ce8a3bff131) has estado CERRADO with snapshot_json. Registro 006 (n_corte 006, ID 169c1b44-5b94-49cb-a6d2-42c3fdeb3a69) is in Lavanderia state without cierre - good for testing preview and cierre execution. cierre_v2.py is deprecated, only cierre.py (cierre_legacy_router) is mounted. Empresa_id is 7. All validation scenarios working: PT required, motivo reapertura min 5 chars, cannot close already closed registro.
